# Security Policy

The canonical version of this policy is published at https://tamazia.co.uk/security-policy/ and machine-readable at https://tamazia.co.uk/.well-known/security.txt per RFC 9116.

## Reporting a vulnerability

Email founder@tamazia.co.uk with the subject prefix "[Security]". We acknowledge within 48 hours and aim to remediate confirmed material issues within 30 days.

## Out of scope

See the full policy. Volumetric DoS, social engineering of staff, and third-party platform issues are not eligible for coordinated handling.

## Safe harbour

Good-faith research conducted under this policy will not be subject to legal action by Tamazia.
